findings.summary: Apex Steel Components Ltd has two pending civil suits in Pune District Court related to commercial disputes with suppliers. No criminal proceedings.
findings.raw_snippet: Case No. CS/2024/1892 and CS/2024/2104 — Apex Steel Components Ltd as respondent in commercial disputes. Status: pending.

findings.summary: Indian auto ancillary steel sector faces headwinds from EV transition but demand remains stable from traditional OEMs.
findings.source_title: Auto Component Industry Faces Mixed Outlook
findings.raw_snippet: Auto ancillary manufacturers in Pune report stable demand from legacy OEMs, though EV transition creates uncertainty for forging and casting units.

findings.summary: Apex Steel Components reported working capital stress in recent filings, with delayed receivables from OEM customers.
findings.raw_snippet: Apex Steel's receivable days increased to 78 from 52 in the prior year, suggesting working capital pressure.

findings.summary: No MCA adverse filings or NCLT proceedings against Apex Steel Components Ltd.
findings.raw_snippet: No NCLT petitions, striking-off proceedings, or fraud complaints found for Apex Steel Components Ltd.
